title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Petroleum Act, 1934. 1[(2) It extends to the whole of India 2***.] (3) It shall come into force on such date3 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1. Subs. by the A.O. 1950, for sub-section (2). 2. The words "except the State of Jammu and Kashmir" omitted by Act 62 of 1956, s. 2 and the Schedule (w.e.f. 1-11-1956). 3. 30th March, 1937, Gazette of India, 1937, pt. I, p. 632.
